calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval Of Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Jan-29-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. Matter has been continued several times with no new filing. Court is taking this matter off calendar.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Omar.

Petition For Approval Of Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Dec-18-2006 Continued To Jan-29-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Approval Of Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Oct-16-2006 Continued To Dec-18-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Mark Senick appearing for petitioners. Douglas Roeca is in court. The Trust can be modified but can not be terminated. It can be converted from a Special Needs Trust to a Generl Trust. Counsel will amended his petition. Matter is continued to 12/18. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Patty Hubble CSR#3058. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petition For Approval Of Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Sep-27-2006 Continued To Oct-16-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Mark Senick appearing for and with russell Roeca. Counsel does not know the matter has been continued to 10/16. He wants to go forward today. Court has not review the file and the continuance date stands. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
